name: Daily Briefing
prompt: daily-briefing skill to execute. Aggregate yesterday's session summaries, today's calendar, email, and tasks into a prioritized briefing. Additionally, please include the schedules for あゆみ様 (ayabe.ayumi@gmail.com) and ゆうき様 (28hs0ibka0oa84810dupunrskk@group.calendar.google.com) from their shared calendars.🌸

name: Vital Check Morning (06:00)
prompt: Run the vitals-coach skill to analyze Garmin data and provide a morning health summary and advice for K-sama. Focus on sleep quality and readiness for the day. Report to #daily-briefing (1491909716945928392).🌸

name: Vital Check Night (22:00)
prompt: Run the vitals-coach skill to analyze Garmin data and provide a night-time rest check and sleep advice for K-sama. Focus on Body Battery and winding down. Report to #daily-briefing (1491909716945928392).🛌

name: Karakeep Daily Recommendation
prompt: Use the 'karakeep' skill to parse user interests from USER.md, match them against recent bookmarks, apply the '_recommended' tag using '502_karakeep-tag-items.sh', and write the standardized log to memory/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md.🌸

name: Karakeep Auto Cleanup (2 weeks stale RSS)
prompt: Use the 'karakeep' skill to run safe RSS auto-cleanup using '501_karakeep-cleanup.sh', and write the standardized log to memory/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md.
